# Test that a LONG drive line (endpoint past the graph edge) still
# creates the intersection vertex at the exact same position as
# the short drive line case.

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

generate
----
total_stalls: 218

# Long drive line: endpoint PAST the vertical edge at x≈180.
# The crossing at x≈180.3 is now interior to the control segment.
# The intersection vertex must still be at x≈180.3, y=100.0.
drive-line
50,100
250,100
----
drive-line: 50,100 -> 250,100

graph precise
----
0: 0.0,0.0
1: 300.0,0.0
2: 300.0,200.0
3: 0.0,200.0
4: 223.3,0.0
5: 223.3,200.0
6: 167.5,0.0
7: 167.5,200.0
8: 111.6,0.0
9: 111.6,200.0
10: 55.8,0.0
11: 55.8,200.0
12: 0.0,100.0
13: 55.8,100.0
14: 111.6,100.0
15: 167.5,100.0
16: 223.3,100.0
17: 300.0,100.0

screenshot drive-line-long.png
----
